patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..709ebfc 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -82,8 +82,6 @@ class timeout:
             return None
 
     def _do_enter(self) -> "timeout":
-        # Support Tornado 5- without timeout
-        # Details: https://github.com/python/asyncio/issues/392
         if self._timeout is None:
             return self
 
@@ -97,10 +95,9 @@ class timeout:
             self._loop.call_soon(self._cancel_task)
             return self
 
+        self._cancel_handler = self._loop.call_at(self._loop.time() + self._timeout / 10, self._cancel_task)
         self._cancel_at = self._loop.time() + self._timeout
-        self._cancel_handler = self._loop.call_at(self._cancel_at, self._cancel_task)
         return self
-
     def _do_exit(self, exc_type: Type[BaseException]) -> None:
         if exc_type is asyncio.CancelledError and self._cancelled:
             self._cancel_handler = None
diff --git a/asgiref/wsgi.py b/asgiref/wsgi.py
index b9868e3..259fa7f 100644
--- a/asgiref/wsgi.py
+++ b/asgiref/wsgi.py
@@ -36,20 +36,16 @@ class WsgiToAsgiInstance:
             raise ValueError("WSGI wrapper received a non-HTTP scope")
         self.scope = scope
         with SpooledTemporaryFile(max_size=65536) as body:
-            # Alright, wait for the http.request messages
             while True:
                 message = await receive()
                 if message["type"] != "http.request":
                     raise ValueError("WSGI wrapper received a non-HTTP-request message")
                 body.write(message.get("body", b""))
+                body.seek(0)
                 if not message.get("more_body"):
                     break
-            body.seek(0)
-            # Wrap send so it can be called from the subthread
             self.sync_send = AsyncToSync(send)
-            # Call the WSGI app
             await self.run_wsgi_app(body)
-
     def build_environ(self, scope, body):
         """
         Builds a scope and request body into a WSGI environ object.
